prompt: A street cleaning robot patrols city sidewalks every night. pausing automatically when pedestrians are detected within 2 meters. If debris container is full, it must return to depot for unloading and then resume the same route. If weather sensors detect rain intensity above 30%, it suspends cleaning and waits under shelter. All routes must eventually be cleaned before sunrise.
constraints: CleanBot returns to depot when debris container full
CleanBot after unloading container at depot it resume in the same route
CleanBot suspends operation in rain > 30% intensity
CleanBot must wait under shelter when rain intensity above 30%

results.constraint: CleanBot suspends operation in rain > 30% intensity

generation.raw_text:
{
    "query": "A[] (CleanBot.rain_intensity > 30% imply CleanBot.operation_suspended)",
    "explanation": "This constraint specifies that whenever the rain intensity exceeds 30%, the CleanBot must immediately suspend its operation. This ensures safety by preventing operations in dangerous conditions.",
    "confidence": 0.85,
    "pattern_used": "safety_immediate_response",
    "operator_used": ["imply"]
}

uppaal_result.explanation: This constraint specifies that whenever the rain intensity exceeds 30%, the CleanBot must immediately suspend its operation. This ensures safety by preventing operations in dangerous conditions.
